ucs.title: [LLM] Qilin (Agenda) Safe-Mode reboot via bcdedit for EDR-bypass pre-encryption
ucs.description: Hunts the highly characteristic Qilin/Agenda tradecraft of forcing the host into Safe Mode with networking via `bcdedit /set ... safeboot network` so the operator can re-enter and execute the encryptor with most EDR/AV agents unloaded. Distinct from generic `bcdedit` recovery tampering — Qilin's Rust/Go encryptor specifically pivots through Safe Mode, which is almost never seen in benign administration.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" (Processes.process="*safeboot*network*" OR Processes.process="*safeboot*minimal*" OR (Processes.process="*set*" AND Processes.process="*default*" AND Processes.process="*safeboot*")) by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where NOT match(user, "(?i)\$$") | append [| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("reg.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe") (Processes.process="*SafeBoot*Network*" OR Processes.process="*MinimalServices*Network*" OR Processes.process="*\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Network*") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where NOT match(user, "(?i)\$$")] | stats count min(firstTime) as firstSeen max(lastTime) as lastSeen values(parent) as parents values(cmdline) as cmdlines by host user | where count>=1
ucs.kql:
// Qilin / Agenda — Safe-Mode reboot tradecraft via bcdedit
// Operator forces safeboot+network so EDR / Defender / 3rd-party AV are
// not running on next boot; encryptor then runs cleanly.
let _safeboot_terms = dynamic(["safeboot","SafeBoot"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"           // skip machine / SYSTEM contexts
| where (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"
           and ProcessCommandLine has "safeboot"
           and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("network","minimal"))
      or (FileName =~ "reg.exe"
           and ProcessCommandLine has @"\CurrentControlSet\Control\SafeBoot\Network"
           and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("add","/d"))
      or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe")
           and ProcessCommandLine has "safeboot"
           and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("bcdedit","BCDedit","BCDEdit"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain,
          FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentPath = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessIntegrityLevel
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Qilin / Agenda — Safe-Mode reboot tradecraft via bcdedit (Sentinel)
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"
            and CommandLine has "safeboot"
            and CommandLine has_any ("network","minimal"))
      or (NewProcessName endswith "\\reg.exe"
            and CommandLine has @"\CurrentControlSet\Control\SafeBoot\Network"
            and CommandLine has_any ("add","/d"))
      or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe","\\cmd.exe")
            and CommandLine has "safeboot"
            and CommandLine has "bcdedit")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName,
          CommandLine, ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Qilin/Agenda Safe-Mode Reboot via bcdedit
id: f5e0c9c1-9ab7-4f2c-93a3-3a8b1f5e9d11
status: experimental
description: Detects bcdedit configuring the OS to boot into Safe Mode with networking, a hallmark of Qilin (Agenda) ransomware to bypass EDR before encryption.
references:
    - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2024/08/22/qilin-ransomware-caught-stealing-credentials-stored-in-google-chrome/
author: SOC DE
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
    - attack.impact
    - attack.t1490
    - attack.t1562
    - attack.t1486
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_bcd:
        Image|endswith: '\bcdedit.exe'
        CommandLine|contains|all:
            - 'safeboot'
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'network'
            - 'minimal'
    selection_reg:
        Image|endswith: '\reg.exe'
        CommandLine|contains|all:
            - '\SafeBoot\Network'
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'add'
            - '/d'
    filter_machine:
        User|endswith: '$'
    condition: (selection_bcd or selection_reg) and not filter_machine
falsepositives:
    - Rare technician troubleshooting on a single workstation
level: high
ucs.rationale: Qilin operators (RaaS, RU-speaking, criminal motivation, also tracked as Agenda by Trend Micro) introduced the Safe-Mode-reboot routine in their Rust variant in 2024 and Sophos/Microsoft IR reporting on the Synnovis (NHS pathology) attack confirmed it as a fingerprint TTP. Generic ransomware deletes shadow copies — Qilin uniquely flips `bcdedit /set {default} safeboot network` (and writes the corr

ucs.title: [LLM] Qilin/Agenda pre-encryption fan-out: VSS wipe + recovery disablement + AV/backup service kill within 5 min
ucs.description: Looks for the Qilin/Agenda pre-encryption ritual — `vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet`, `wbadmin delete catalog`, `bcdedit ... ignoreallfailures` / `recoveryenabled no`, plus mass `net stop` / `sc stop` of AV, SQL, Veeam and Hyper-V services — all from a single host within a 5-minute window. Each command alone is noisy; the chained occurrence is a near-deterministic Qilin fingerprint.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" (Processes.process_name IN ("vssadmin.exe","wbadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe","taskkill.exe","powershell.exe")) by host Processes.process_name Processes.process _time span=1s | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval bucket=floor(_time/300)*300 | eval is_vss=if(match(process_name,"(?i)^(vssadmin|wmic)\.exe$") AND match(cmdline,"(?i)(delete\s+shadows|shadowcopy.*delete)"),1,0) | eval is_wbadmin=if(match(process_name,"(?i)^wbadmin\.exe$") AND match(cmdline,"(?i)delete\s+(catalog|systemstatebackup|backup)"),1,0) | eval is_bcd=if(match(process_name,"(?i)^bcdedit\.exe$") AND match(cmdline,"(?i)(ignoreallfailures|recoveryenabled\s+no)"),1,0) | eval is_svc=if(match(process_name,"(?i)^(net1?|sc|taskkill)\.exe$") AND match(cmdline,"(?i)(stop|delete|/im\s+).*(veeam|backup|sql|mssql|exchange|sophos|sentinel|crowdstrike|defender|symantec|mcafee|trendmicro|hyperv|vmms)"),1,0) | stats sum(is_vss) as vss sum(is_wbadmin) as wba sum(is_bcd) as bcd sum(is_svc) as svc values(cmdline) as cmds values(parent) as parents min(firstTime) as firstSeen max(lastTime) as lastSeen by host bucket | eval signal_count=(if(vss>0,1,0)+if(wba>0,1,0)+if(bcd>0,1,0)+if(svc>0,1,0)) | where signal_count>=3 | sort - lastSeen
ucs.kql:
// Qilin / Agenda — pre-encryption recovery destruction + service-stop fan-out
// Each leg is suspicious; ≥3 legs from one host inside 5 minutes is the
// Qilin signature.
let _window = 5m;
let _av_backup_keywords = dynamic(["veeam","backup","sql","mssql","exchange",
    "sophos","sentinel","crowdstrike","defender","symantec","mcafee",
    "trendmicro","hyperv","vmms","acronis","esent"]);
let _events =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | extend cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
    | extend Leg =
        case(
            FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe"  and cmd has "delete" and cmd has "shadows", "VSS",
            FileName =~ "wmic.exe"      and cmd has "shadowcopy" and cmd has "delete", "VSS",
            FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"   and cmd has "delete" and cmd has_any ("catalog","systemstatebackup","backup"), "WBADMIN",
            FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"   and (cmd has "ignoreallfailures" or (cmd has "recoveryenabled" and cmd has " no")), "BCDEDIT",
            FileName in~ ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe","taskkill.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
              and cmd has_any ("stop","delete","kill","/im")
              and cmd has_any (_av_backup_keywords), "SVCKILL",
            "")
    | where isnotempty(Leg);
_events
| summarize Legs = make_set(Leg),
            LegCount = dcount(Leg),
            EvCount = count(),
            Cmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 50),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, _window)
| where LegCount >= 3                  // ≥3 distinct ritual legs in 5 min = Qilin chain
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Qilin / Agenda — pre-encryption ritual (Sentinel SecurityEvent EID 4688)
let _window = 5m;
let _av_backup_keywords = dynamic(["veeam","backup","sql","mssql","exchange",
    "sophos","sentinel","crowdstrike","defender","symantec","mcafee",
    "trendmicro","hyperv","vmms","acronis"]);
let _events =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend cmd = tolower(CommandLine), img = tolower(NewProcessName)
    | extend Leg =
        case(
            img endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and cmd has "delete" and cmd has "shadows", "VSS",
            img endswith "\\wmic.exe"     and cmd has "shadowcopy" and cmd has "delete", "VSS",
            img endswith "\\wbadmin.exe"  and cmd has "delete" and cmd has_any ("catalog","systemstatebackup","backup"), "WBADMIN",
            img endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"  and (cmd has "ignoreallfailures" or (cmd has "recoveryenabled" and cmd has " no")), "BCDEDIT",
            (img endswith "\\net.exe" or img endswith "\\net1.exe" or img endswith "\\sc.exe" or img endswith "\\taskkill.exe" or img endswith "\\powershell.exe" or img endswith "\\pwsh.exe")
              and cmd has_any ("stop","delete","kill","/im")
              and cmd has_any (_av_backup_keywords), "SVCKILL",
            "")
    | where isnotempty(Leg);
_events
| summarize Legs = make_set(Leg),
            LegCount = dcount(Leg),
            Cmds = make_set(CommandLine, 50),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, _window)
| where LegCount >= 3
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Qilin/Agenda affiliate playbooks (Group-IB, Trend Micro, Microsoft Threat Intelligence reporting on Storm-2603-style RaaS chains targeting healthcare and manufacturing) consistently chain VSS deletion, wbadmin catalog wipe, bcdedit recovery disablement and an AV/backup `net stop` fan-out within seconds — frequently dropped as a single batch script staged from `C:\ProgramData\` before launching the
